name: Sophie Jones
description:
Sophie mets Chloe and Charles by accident at an event she went to mistakenly. They open up a new world of female dominance, chastity and cuckolding and now Sophie wants to introduce them to her partner with the aim of taking him on a similar journey.

Hope you enjoy.. it's obviously not for everyone but have fun doing whatever you can with them!
creator: Ell-enn
